heading: Today
text: Early sun south. Showers in NY by late morning, spreading east.5

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Scattered showers, more numerous south of Rt. 2, diminishing north.

heading: Thursday
text: Localized, passing showers, more numerous west late.

heading: Friday
